top.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy

top.title: Virginia approves redistricting, giving Democrats edge in midterms
top.summary: The new maps in Virginia could make it easier for Democrats to take control of the US House of Representatives in November.

top.summary: The impact is being felt by manufacturers, retailers and the digital sector, amid warnings it could get worse if the war resumes.

top.summary: The creator of iconic series such as Fable says Masters of Albion will be the last game he makes.

top.title: Meta to track workers' clicks and keystrokes to train AI
top.summary: The firm will take data from the way employees work for its artificial intelligence models.

top.title: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
